## Checklist

- [ ] `dart format` + `dart analyze --fatal-infos` are clean
- [ ] `flutter test` passes; domain coverage stays ≥ 90%
- [ ] Public API changes are documented (dartdoc) and noted in `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Logic added in `lib/src/domain/` (pure Dart) with unit tests, not in native
- [ ] Docs (`README` / `ARCHITECTURE` / `MIGRATION`) updated if behavior changed
